name: How to create a location tag for your business on Instagram
description: Are you committed to improving your Instagram visibility? The creation of a location tag for your company on Instagram is one of the efficient methods. Learn immediately with our easy tutorial guide.
main_title: How to create a location tag for your business on Instagram | Synup
richtext:
Are you determined to improve your visibility on Instagram? A variety of clever solutions can help you get the attention you desire, but few are as effective or as easy to implement as location tags. 

Among the most versatile outreach options available, Instagram's location tags get the word out not only with official updates from your business, but also, via user-generated content. 

To help you get started, we've outlined the simple steps to creating custom Instagram location tags.

seo.title: How to create a location tag for your business on Instagram | Synup
seo.description: To change the background color of your Instagram story, tap the pen icon, select the color picker tool, tap on desired color, use your finger to paint over the areas you want to change and use the eraser tool to remove any unwanted color.
